text:
In the first scene, as I listen to the repetitive and somewhat circular discussion about blockchain and 'blockdata,' I feel both detached and slightly amused. The jargon seems to swirl around the room, reinforcing itself without reaching clarity. I notice curiosity and perhaps a tinge of skepticism rising within me about whether anyone here truly grasps the full implications of the subject.

In the second scene, I am struck by a sense of introspection. The illuminated wall with 'R+D' and the reflective text on the screen evoke in me thoughts about ambiguity and the gap between intent and perception. The atmosphere feels contemplative, even vulnerable, as if all present are engaged in silent negotiations with their own uncertainties. I feel connected to this search for meaning in the midst of exposed thoughts and casual encounters.
